retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year, then destroy. Records sent to the Office of Legal Services specifically in response to a subpoena are subject to this schedule, but the record maintained by another office is subject to the applicable retention schedule. ; Electronic: Retain for one year, then destroy. Records sent to the Office of Legal Services specifically in response to a subpoena are subject to this schedule, but the record maintained by another office is subject to the applicable retention schedule., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
